# IOUSBGetFrameStruct

**Structure**

## Declaration

```swift
typedef struct IOUSBGetFrameStruct {
    ...
} IOUSBGetFrameStruct;
```

## Overview

Structure used from user space to return the frame number and a timestamp on when the frame register was read.

## Instance Properties

- **frame**
- **timeStamp**
